3202860.name: Arcanus Legends
3202860.description:
Arcanus Legends craft any spell imaginable and rebuild villages while facing epic challenges in a magical universe. Arcanus Legends is a single player & online co-op action RPG.

Dynamic Spell Crafting System: In Arcanus Legends, magic is not just a tool, but a canvas for players to unleash their creativity. With a robust spell crafting system, players can customize and create spells using various modifiers. These modifiers can be found through quests, challenges or exploring the dungeons.

Sandbox Village Building: Collect mystical runes to bring back the town's inhabitants and their homes from the timeless dimension. Witness the town evolve and thrive under your magical influence.
3202860.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
